parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
• Deep Molecular Repair: Powered by melting Pro-Vitamin B5 pearls, this treatment helps bond and strengthen the damaged hair core^ at the molecular level, improving hair’s inner resilience and structure.
• Instant Millions of Nutrient Infusion : Melts instantly and releasing millions of nutrient molecules to penetrate deep into damaged areas for targeted, intensive repair.
• Concentrated Hair Treatment: Provides targeted nourishment to severely weakened hair, rescuing flowy, bouncy strands from the effects of frequent heat styling, colouring, or bleaching.
• Flowy and Bouncy Finish: Leaves hair feeling soft, flowy, and full of life.
• For best results, pair with Pantene shampoo and conditioner and use at least 2–3 times a week to reveal softer, healthier, and more resilient hair.

metaData.Key Information: When hair feels rough, brittle and dry, deep repair is essential. Pantene Miracle Intensive Serum Mask Bond Repair with 10,000 Pro-Vitamin B5 pearls offers intensive care for severely damaged strands. Perfect for hair weakened by frequent heat styling, colouring, or bleaching.
metaData.Preparation:
How to Use:
1. Mix the product in your palm to melt the Pro-V pearls for better absorption.
2. Massage into wet hair, focusing on mid-lengths to ends.
3. Leave on for 1–3 minutes to allow deep nutrient penetration.
4. Rinse thoroughly.
metaData.SAP Product Name: PANTENE MIRACLE INTENSIVE SERUM MASK BOND REPAIR 300ML

metaData.Key Information: Formula with Pro-vitamin B5 & Collagen penetrates deeply to repair damaged hair bonds.Non-greasy formula. Use daily, before exposure to sun and wind.

product.description: • Strengthen damaged hair bonds. 99% Less Breakage for stronger hair^ • Deeply moisturizes dry hair for a hydrating glow • Nourishes your hair for shiny weighty hair, preventing split end formation. • Formulated for Dry, Brittle Hair • Suitable for colour-treated & bleached hair.

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Xylenesulfonate, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Fragrance, Sodium Citrate, Stearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Tetrasodium Edta, Polyquaternium-6, Panthenol, Trihydroxystearin, Histidine, Biotin, Methylchloroisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone
metaData.Key Information:
New! Pantene Silicone-Free+ Shampoo infused with Pro-Vitamin B5 and Biotin.
Strengthen hair bond# 99% Less Breakage for stronger hair^

Formulated with Pantene's Patented Gel Network targeted repair with less weigh down for smooth, free-flowy and non-sticky hair.

Provides exceptional cleansing, while nourishing hair with Pro-V Nutrients formula to strengthen it (against breakage) from inside-out#.

When used regularly with Pantene Miracles Conditioner:

• Strengthen damaged hair bonds. 99% Less Breakage for stronger hair^.
• Deeply moisturizes dry hair for a hydrating glow
• Nourishes your hair for shiny weighty hair, preventing split end formation.
• Formulated for Dry, Brittle Hair
• Suitable for colour-treated & bleached hair.

+Formulated without; except for carry over additives
^with regular system use with Pantene Miracles conditioner
#up to cortex level
metaData.Preparation: Directions: Massage onto wet scalp and hair gently. Rinse off thoroughly. Recommended for daily use.

product.description:
• Molecular Repair Formula: Penetrates deep and strengthens the hair core^ to repair damage from the inside out. Repairs 3 years of damage.
• Millions of Pro-Vitamin Molecules: Pro-Vitamin B5 pearls infuses millions of pro-vitamin nutrient molecules instantly upon application.
• Damage Rescue: Repairs hair from frequent heat styling, colouring, or bleaching.
• Lightweight Formula: Provides deep treatment without leaving hair greasy.
• For Everyday Use: Provides the nourishment you need to maintain healthy, beautiful hair.
• For best results, pair with Pantene shampoo and conditioner at least 2–3 times a week, and discover the transformation to hair that feels as vibrant and beautiful as it looks.

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Stearyl Alcohol, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Silicone Quaternium-26, Cetyl Alcohol, Fragrance, Isopropyl Alcohol, Benzyl Alcohol, Disodium Edta, Panthenol, Polysorbate 20, Histidine, Citric Acid, Biotin, Silica, Hydrolyzed Keratin (Capra Hircus), Collagen Amino Acids (Gadus Morhua), Methylchloroisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone, Panthenyl Ethyl Ether, Ci 77492
metaData.Key Information: Dreaming of silky, flowy, resilient hair? Pantene Miracle Daily Serum Treatment Bond Repair brings you one step closer. This lightweight formula contains 5,000 Pro-Vitamin B5 pearls that melt instantly upon application. The millions of nutrients molecules released into the formula help to strengthen and repair damaged hair from within.
metaData.Preparation:
How to Use:
1. Mix the product in your palm to melt the Pro-V pearls for better absorption.
2. Massage into wet hair, focusing on mid-lengths to ends.
3. Leave on for 1–3 minutes to allow deep nutrient penetration.
4. Rinse thoroughly.
metaData.SAP Product Name: PANTENE MIRACLE DAILY SERUM TREATMENT BOND REPAIR 180ML
